prompt: Create a dynamic vertical anime action illustration of a pink-haired female martial artist in a dramatic low-angle composition, wearing a glossy deep magenta floral Chinese-inspired qipao mini dress with gold embroidery, black thigh-high stockings, garter details, and black shoes. She is captured mid-spinning high kick, with one leg thrust directly toward the camera so the sole dominates the upper center of the frame, her other knee bent near the ground, long flowing pink hair and ribbons whipping around her, and her face deliberately covered by a flat rose-pink square censor block. Surround her with one sweeping circular ribbon of neon pink magical slash energy, bright sparks, motion trails, shattered stone fragments, and flying pink petals. Include exactly one airborne dark-clothed male ninja opponent in the upper right being knocked backward by the kick. Set the scene in a moonlit ancient East Asian street with tiled rooftops, red lantern glow, wooden architecture, a single large full moon in the cloudy night sky, cracked pavement, cinematic debris, strong foreshortening, intense perspective, ultra-detailed anime rendering, high contrast magenta lighting, dramatic action blur, glossy highlights, and a polished fantasy battle poster aesthetic.
